name: legal-clinic
description: Sets up the clinic, onboards students, runs structured intake, tracks deadlines with malpractice-aware caution, and hands off cases at semester end — built within ABA Formal Op. 512.

interface.shortDescription: Sets up the clinic, onboards students, runs structured intake, tracks deadlines with malpractice-aware caution, and hands off cases at seme…
interface.longDescription: Sets up the clinic, onboards students, runs structured intake, tracks deadlines with malpractice-aware caution, and hands off cases at semester end — built within ABA Formal Op. 512. Migrated for Codex as a repo-scoped plugin. V1 supports local files and pasted text by default; remote connectors must be configured separately.
defaultPrompt: Use Legal Clinic with local files or pasted text.
